text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After inadvertently finding out one evening that
Sakura Chiyono O is considering quitting racing,
Mejiro Ardan is left dumbstruck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O laments that a substantial skill
gap has emerged between herself and her two
rivals, who have improved in the time since she
withdrew from racing due to her injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Sakura Chiyono O feeling that there's no
point in her returning to racing, Mejiro Ardan
asks her to watch the upcoming battle between
herself and Yaeno Muteki at the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as one has rivals, one can surpass one's
limits an infinite number of times.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan burns with the desire to use her
running to prove this to Sakura Chiyono O!
